allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); let content = fs.readFileSync\('src/generator/prompt.ts', 'utf8'\); content = content.replace\(/btoa\\\(`\\$\\{username\\}:\\$\\{password\\}`\\\)/g, 'btoa\(\\`\\${username}:\\${password}\\`\)'\); content = content.replace\(/Bearer \\$\\{bearer_token\\}`/g, 'Bearer \\`\\${bearer_token}\\`'\); fs.writeFileSync\('src/generator/prompt.ts', content, 'utf8'\); console.log\('Escaped $ sequences properly'\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); let c = fs.readFileSync\('src/generator/prompt.ts','utf8'\); c = c.replace\(/btoa\\\(`\\$\\{username\\}:\\$\\{password\\}`\\\)/g, 'btoa\(`\\${username}:\\${password}`\)'\); c = c.replace\(/Bearer `\\$\\{bearer_token\\}`/g, 'Bearer `\\${bearer_token}`'\); fs.writeFileSync\('src/generator/prompt.ts', c, 'utf8'\); console.log\('done'\);")

Bash(node -e "import fs from 'fs'; let c = fs.readFileSync\('src/generator/prompt.ts', 'utf8'\); c = c.replace\(/btoa\\\(`\\\\\\$\\{username\\}:\\\\\\$\\{password\\}`\\\)/g, 'btoa\(username + \\":\\" + password\)'\); c = c.replace\(/Bearer \\\\\\$\\{bearer_token\\}`/g, 'Bearer ' + bearer_token\); fs.writeFileSync\('src/generator/prompt.ts', c, 'utf8'\); console.log\('done'\);")

Bash(node -e "import fs from 'fs'; let c = fs.readFileSync\('src/generator/prompt.ts', 'utf8'\); console.log\(c.indexOf\('btoa'\)\); console.log\(c.substring\(c.indexOf\('btoa'\), c.indexOf\('btoa'\) + 100\)\);")

Bash(node -e "import fs from 'fs'; let c = fs.readFileSync\('src/generator/prompt.ts', 'utf8'\); const idx = c.indexOf\('btoa'\); console.log\('Context:', JSON.stringify\(c.substring\(idx-50, idx+200\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "import fs from 'fs'; let c = fs.readFileSync\('src/generator/prompt.ts', 'utf8'\); c = c.replace\(/btoa\\\(`\\\\\\$\\{username\\}:\\\\\\$\\{password\\}\\\\`\\\)/g, 'btoa\(username + \\":\\" + password\)'\); c = c.replace\(/Bearer \\\\\\$\\{bearer_token\\}\\\\`/g, 'Bearer ' + bearer_token\); fs.writeFileSync\('src/generator/prompt.ts', c, 'utf8'\); console.log\('done'\);")
